series_metadata.series_title: Certificates of Public Convenience and Necessity
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the request for and granting of

retention_rules.disposition: Retain 5 years after end of calendar year, then microfilm records according to Library of Virginia's standards/guidelines; retain microfilm permanently in agency. Transfer original camera negative to Imaging Services Branch of the Library of Virginia. Destroy originals after quality control inspection verifies information was successfully transferred to new format. Disposal reporting of paper on Certificate of Records Destruction (RM-3 Form) not required.

retention_rules.disposition: Retain 2 years after end of calendar year then destroy in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page.

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents service area boundaries for local and extended local service telephone companies.
This series documents the filing of tariffs ,including rules, regulations and rates, by telephone companies as required by Code of Virginia, § 56-480.

retention_rules.disposition: Retain 3 years after end of calendar year then microfilm records according to Library of Virginia's standards/guidelines. Retain microfilm permanently in agency. Transfer original camera negative to Imaging Services, the Library of Virginia. Destroy originals after quality control inspection verifies information was successfully transferred to new format. Disposal reporting of paper on Certificate of Records Destruction (RM-3 Form) not required.
